---
title: "Module 3 Code Tutorial"
subtitle: "Treatment Effects, Natural Experiments, and Causal Mechanisms"
---

<!--
  SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
  ==================
  1. Open "Module 3- Causal Inference/Module 3 Code Tutorials.qmd"
  2. Copy everything AFTER the closing --- of the YAML block (i.e., from the ```{r setup chunk onward)
  3. Paste it below this comment block
  4. Also copy both figs/ and figures/ folders from "Module 3- Causal Inference/" into this folder (module-3/)

  The YAML above replaces the original --- block entirely.
  Do NOT copy the original title/format/execute YAML — it is already handled by _quarto.yml.

  NOTE: Module 3 installs several packages at runtime including synthdid from GitHub.
  On first render this will take several minutes.
  After the first render, execute: freeze: auto in _quarto.yml means it won't re-run unless you change the source.
-->
